name_source: Number of n-step one-sided prudent walks, avoiding single west steps and single east steps.

name_source: Square array A(row,col): A(row,1) = A276937(row), and for col > 1, A(row,col) = A003961(A(row,col-1)), read by descending antidiagonals: A(1,1), A(1,2), A(2,1), A(1,3), A(2,2), A(3,1), etc.

name_source: Number of unlabeled 3-uniform hypergraphs spanning n vertices.
